title: Section 76
content: (1) The Mayor or in his absence, the Deputy Mayor, shall preside at every meeting of 1[2[the Corporation]]. 3[(2) In the absence of both the Mayor and Deputy Mayor from the meeting, the members and the persons referred to in sub-clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (3) of section 3 shall elect one from among the councillors to preside.] (3) The Mayor or the person presiding over a meeting shall have and exercise a second or a casting vote in all cases of equality of votes.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022). 3. Subs. by s. 56, ibid., for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 1-10-1993).
